name: Roadmap Burn Down Proof Model Lane
outcome_goal: Prove one explicit model route can launch before the roadmap waves are submitted.

jobs.label: proof_model_route
jobs.prompt: Return exactly one compact JSON object with keys ok, model, verdict, and launch_risk. Set ok to true, model to openai/gpt-5.4-mini, verdict to 'explicit model route is usable for the roadmap burn-down proof', and launch_risk to one sentence naming any evidence boundary you can infer from the prompt. Do not write files.
